problem id: 4ac6f0cb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11001011 -> 01101100
  10001111 -> 11101000
  11100111 -> 11101110
  10100001 -> 00101010
  01111111 -> 11100111
  01111100 -> 10000111
  10110110 -> 11001011
  11000001 -> 00101100
  11000010 -> 01001100
  01111110 -> 11000111

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 10100101
